world_news.headline: Middle East crisis live: Trump says he will extend US ceasefire with Iran to allow its leadership to submit ‘a unified proposal’
world_news.summary:
US president moved off earlier threat to resume bombing, saying Pakistan officials requested ceasefire extension; military blockade on Iranian ports to continue, Trump says

Iran’s armed forces are ready to deliver an “immediate and decisive response” to any renewed hostile action by its adversaries, Ali Abdollahi, commander of the Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters, was quoted by the Tasnim news agency as having said.

He said Tehran had the upper hand militarily, including in the management of the strait of Hormuz, and would not allow Donald Trump to “create false narratives over the situation on the ground.”

Continue reading...

world_news.headline: Trump extends US-Iran ceasefire indefinitely at request of Pakistan
world_news.summary:
US president says on Truth Social attacks are on hold until Iran submits proposal and talks reach end

  • Middle East crisis – live updates

  • Sign up for the Breaking News US newsletter email

Donald Trump announced in a social media post on Tuesday that he was indefinitely extending a ceasefire with Iran at the request of Pakistan, which has been mediating talks, until the country responded to the United States’ negotiating positions or until talks reached a dead end.

“I have therefore directed our Military to continue the Blockade and, in all other respects, remain ready and able, and will therefore extend the Ceasefire until such time as their proposal is submitted, and discussions are concluded, one way or the other,” the US president wrote on Truth Social.

Continue reading...

world_news.headline: EU eyes options as Iran conflict threatens jet fuel shortages
world_news.summary: The blockade of the Strait of Hormuz is causing concern in Europe, which relies heavily on imported jet fuel.

world_news.headline: Sudan refugees returning home face new ‘struggle for survival’: UN
world_news.summary: Returnees find chronic need for investment with homes, water supplies, health provision, electricity 'heavily damaged'.

world_news.headline: Germany, Italy block bid to suspend EU-Israel trade agreement
world_news.summary: Germany and Italy have blocked the European Union from suspending the bloc’s association agreement with Israel.

world_news.headline: Trump’s US Fed nominee Warsh vows independence, says he’s no ‘sock puppet’
world_news.summary: Kevin Warsh's confirmation hearing shines spotlight on doubts over his independence as Trump pushes again for rate cuts.

world_news.headline: Two CIA agents reportedly killed in car crash in Mexican state of Chihuahua
world_news.summary: The presence of US officials in a law enforcement convoy raises questions about respect for Mexico's sovereignty.

world_news.headline: Israeli rabbi who bulldozed Gaza honoured as torchbearer
world_news.summary: Avraham Zarbiv, known for gleefully documenting his bulldozing of Gaza, was honoured on Israel’s “Independence Day”.

world_news.headline: Video: Israeli soldiers sing national anthem on ruins of Lebanese town
world_news.summary: Israeli soldiers were seen singing the Israeli national anthem on the ruins of a demolished town in southern Lebanon.

world_news.headline: Russian police raid book publisher accused of pushing ‘gay propaganda’
world_news.summary: Raid is part of Moscow's hardline social conservatism and clampdown on political life.
